bundles.name: J-SOX Internal Controls
bundles.description: Financial reporting internal controls required under the Japanese Financial Instruments and Exchange Act.

rules.statement: All financial transactions require dual approval above JPY 1M
Revenue recognition must follow IFRS 15 five-step model

bundles.name: GDPR Data Protection
bundles.description: EU General Data Protection Regulation compliance controls.

rules.statement: Personal data processing requires documented legal basis
Data subject access requests within 30 days

bundles.name: EU AI Act Compliance
bundles.description: Controls for AI systems classified as high-risk.

rules.statement: AI system risk classification must be documented
High-risk AI systems require human oversight
AI training data must be bias-tested

exceptions.ruleStatement: Monthly overtime MUST NOT exceed 45 hours
exceptions.justification: Critical production incident response — temporary 2-week exception

exceptions.ruleStatement: Leave requests MUST be submitted 14 days in advance
Expenses over JPY 100,000 require dual approval
exceptions.justification: Urgent vendor payment — second approver on leave

exceptions.ruleStatement: External communications require comms department review
exceptions.justification: Time-sensitive client response — post-hoc review requested

regulatory_updates.title: Amendment to Labor Standards Act Article 36 (overtime caps)
regulatory_updates.source: Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare
regulatory_updates.summary: Monthly overtime cap revised from 45 to 40 hours for companies with 50+ employees. Special clause thresholds unchanged.

regulatory_updates.title: APPI Enforcement Regulation Amendment
regulatory_updates.summary: New breach notification requirements: 72-hour reporting window, expanded scope of reportable incidents.

regulatory_updates.title: Revised Invoice System Qualification Requirements
regulatory_updates.summary: Qualified invoice issuer registration requirements updated. Small business transitional period extended.

regulatory_updates.title: Child Care and Family Care Leave Act Amendment
regulatory_updates.source: Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare
regulatory_updates.summary: Extended childcare leave eligibility to include part-time workers. New employer disclosure requirements.
